questions.question_text: Examine China strategic vision behind ‘The Belt and Road initiative (BRI)' also known as One Belt One Road (OBOR).
Elaborate the reasons and impacts on Donald Trump withdrawal from climate change Paris agreement in 2015.
What will be the reason of emerging water conflict between Pakistan and Afghanistan?
Give a critical review of Pakistan Energy Policy 2013 – 2018.
How can the corruption elimination strategy be made part of governance system of Pakistan?
How can the governing structure have the capacity to neutralize threats to internal security of Pakistan?
Discuss instrument of techniques of Hybrid warfare in context to Pakistan.
